Config misuse.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/config.go --
package shared

//fabrik:config
func NotAStruct() {}

//fabrik:config
type Config struct {
	Addr string `yaml:"addr"`
}

//fabrik:config
type Config2 struct{}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"app/shared"
)

type Handlers struct {
	Config  *shared.Config
	Config2 *shared.Config2
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: shared/config.go:3:1: //fabrik:config must be on a struct type declaration
error: shared/config.go:11:1: section "" is already configured by Config
  help: first declared at $WORK/shared/config.go:6:1
